title: Karl's Event Low Shield
description: In Karl's Event, He used a Shield of his theme, which is looking GOOD.
body:
**🛡️ Karl's Event - Shield Pack**

_✨ Features_

- 🎯 Event-Inspired Design
> Captures the vibe of Karl’s iconic Minecraft event
- ⚡ Perfect Vanilla Fit
> Matches Minecraft’s default style (no weird mismatch)
- 🔥 PvP Visibility [low shield]
> Doesn't block the visibility
- 🧩 Plug & Play
> No mods required — works as a simple resource pack
